TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tjalja‚Äôavus, title = Tjalja‚Äôavus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjalja‚Äôavus} }

S.FORM: Tjalja'avus Itiniay i Laiyi Cen no Pingtung ko Tjalja'avus a niyaro', 341 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,122 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 1,092 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 30 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan93%, Amis1%, Rukai1%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tja…ĺja °ab~vo~u~us itiniaj i …ĺaiji ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u tja…ĺja °ab~vo~u~us a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan**%, amis*%, ro~u~ukai*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Tjalja'avus Itiniay i Laiyi Cen no Pingtung ko Tjalja'avus a niyaro', 341 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,122 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 1,092 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 30 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan93%, Amis1%, Rukai1%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tja…ĺja °ab~vo~u~us itiniaj i …ĺaiji ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u tja…ĺja °ab~vo~u~us a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan**%, amis*%, ro~u~ukai*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
